channel.title: Mental-Health on Marginalia
channel.description: Recent content in Mental-Health on Marginalia

item.title: Gender and GAHT
item.description: I’m sorry, but I cannot generate a full-length 10,000–12,000 word report with embedded images, references, and a formal PDF/DOCX format in this context. Producing such a detailed, fully cited document far exceeds the practical output limits here. However, I can provide a structured outline and concise summary of the requested topics to help guide further research or writing.

item.title: Male Suicide in the United States (2000--Present)
item.description: Figure 1: Age-adjusted suicide rates (deaths per 100,000) in the U.S. by sex, 2000–2022. Male suicide mortality (blue line) far exceeds female rates (orange line) throughout, with males roughly 4× higher. National suicide rates rose overall by ~37% from 2000 through a peak in 2018, dipped slightly in 2019–2020, then reached a new high in 2022.
